title: Pecluma filicula
taxonomy: Pecluma filicula is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Pecluma, which is a group of ferns native to the Americas. The species is further classified as a member of the family Polypodiaceae, which is a large family of vascular plants that includes over 1,000 species of ferns. The classification of Pecluma filicula reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a member of the Polypodiaceae family. This classification is widely accepted in the botanical community and is used to identify and distinguish Pecluma filicula from other related species.
